# Python dependencies for the ms-presentation-deck derivative scripts.
# Used by make_pdf.py (PDF export) and validate_derivatives.py
# (PDF/PPTX quality gate). audit.py and make_public.py use the standard library,
# with audit.py shelling out to `node --check`.
#
# Install:
#   pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt
#   python -m playwright install chromium
#
# validate_derivatives.py opens PPTX files with python-pptx to prove the deck is
# native/editable and that speaker notes match the requested locale.

playwright>=1.40,<2.0
pypdf>=4.0,<6.0
python-pptx>=0.6.21,<1.1
